title: Stock futures climb on strong earnings, end of U.S.-Iran ceasefire looms: Live updates
summary: The Nasdaq's 13-day winning streak ended, marking its longest positive run since 1992, as markets digest strong earnings reports amid geopolitical tensions over U.S.-Iran ceasefire negotiations.
content: The Nasdaq Composite snapped a 13-day win streak on Monday, its longest positive run since 1992.

title: Warsh Fed hearing live updates: Kevin Warsh to face Senate Banking Committee at 10 a.m. ET
summary: Federal Reserve chair nominee Kevin Warsh faces Senate confirmation hearings where lawmakers will scrutinize his positions on interest rates and potential conflicts of interest involving his personal wealth.

title: GE’s stock turns lower, as the Iran conflict tempers the outlook despite an earnings beat
summary: GE Aerospace's stock declined despite beating earnings expectations, as the company's cautious outlook reflects uncertainty from the ongoing Iran conflict affecting aerospace and defense demand.

title: ‘This is unbelievable’: My adviser made $300,000 trading options. Now I’m being killed by taxes. Do I fire him?

title: ‘I have full guardianship’: My son has special needs. If I buy him a condo, will that hurt his benefits?

title: UnitedHealth tops quarterly estimates, hikes profit outlook as insurer manages high medical costs
summary: UnitedHealth beat quarterly earnings expectations and raised 2026 profit guidance to $18.25+ per share, demonstrating success managing medical cost pressures as the nation's largest private insurer.
content: The nation's largest private insurer expects 2026 adjusted earnings of more than $18.25 per share, up from a previous outlook of greater than $17.75 per share.

title: Apple incoming CEO John Ternus faces a defining challenge: Fixing the company's AI strategy
summary: Incoming Apple CEO John Ternus inherits a significant challenge to advance the company's AI strategy, an area where predecessor Tim Cook made limited progress. Ternus's technical background positions him to address this critical gap in Apple's competitive positioning.
content: Tim Cook had a highly successful tenure as Apple's CEO, but he leaves his successor with a big gap to fill when it comes to the company's position in AI.
